data.title: Advanced Threat Protection
data.description: Integration of Azure Advanced Threat Protection for proactive security.
data.technical_spec: Real-time threat detection and monitoring powered by machine learning.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: Requires MFA for accessing sensitive and administrative areas of the website.
data.technical_spec: Uses Azure MFA services for additional security layers.

data.title: Secure Sockets Layer (SSL)
data.description: Implementation of HTTPS across the entire site to ensure secure data transmission.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.2/1.3 encryption protocols ensure data integrity and privacy.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic security audits to identify and rectify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Vulnerability assessments and penetration testing carried out regularly.

data.title: Data Encryption at Rest
data.description: Ensures all user data is encrypted while stored to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Advanced Encryption Standard (AES) 256-bit used for disk encryption.
